narrative:
Jefferson Township (precinct in Adams County) has 480 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
